query:
WITH prev AS (
            SELECT needs_reauth FROM email_links WHERE id = $1 FOR UPDATE
        )
        UPDATE email_links e
        SET needs_reauth = true,
            last_sync_error_at = NOW(),
            updated_at = NOW()
        FROM prev
        WHERE e.id = $1
        RETURNING (NOT prev.needs_reauth) AS "did_transition!"
